stemHtml: According to the European Regulation on Air Operations, an Operator should establish, implement, and maintain a management system that includes..

options.a: methods to maintain personnel trained and competent to perform their task.
options.b: procedures for amending financial statements, when required to do so.
options.c: listings of all standardised practices, irrespective of the size and complexity of operations.
options.d: a description of all the routes operated.
